codeReview.summary: The error handling implementation is comprehensive and well-designed. The MaestroError class properly extends Error with message and hints array for user recovery guidance. JSON serialization is implemented via toJSON() method with optional stack trace support. Exit code constants (SUCCESS=0, ERROR=1, USAGE_ERROR=2) are properly defined and used. CLI error handling in index.ts correctly propagates errors with both formatted text output (indented hints) and JSON output when --json flag is used. All 16 unit tests pass covering structured errors, serialization, exit codes, factory functions, and inheritance patterns.

summary: Feature m1-error-handling passes review. Implementation fully covers all requirements: MaestroError class with message/hints, JSON serialization, exit codes, and CLI error display. 16 tests passing. No issues found.
